# Parabola vertex location formula

## Short Teaching Summary
Parabola vertex location formula: The x-coordinate of the vertex of a parabola y = ax^2 + bx + c can be found using the formula x = -b/2a. Map connection: this idea links by example_of, requires to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
